items.docs: Returns the FHIR CapabilityStatement describing this server's supported resources, search parameters, and security.
Returns the SMART App Launch configuration document describing OAuth 2.0 endpoints, scopes, and capabilities.

params.name: id
params.description: FHIR logical id of the resource.

items.docs: Read a single Patient resource by FHIR logical id.

params.name: identifier
params.description: A patient identifier (e.g. MRN, system|value).

params.name: name
params.description: A portion of either family or given name of the patient.

params.name: family
params.description: Family (last) name.

params.name: given
params.description: Given (first) name.

params.name: birthdate
params.description: The patient's date of birth.

params.name: gender
params.description: Administrative gender.

params.name: _count
params.description: Number of resources to return per page.

items.docs: Search Patient resources by identifier, name, birthdate, or other US Core search parameters.

params.name: patient
params.description: Reference to the Patient (id or Patient/{id}).

params.name: category
params.description: US Core observation category (laboratory, vital-signs, social-history, smoking-status, survey).

params.name: code
params.description: LOINC or SNOMED CT code identifying the observation.

params.name: date
params.description: Observation date (effective).

params.name: _count
params.description: Number of resources to return per page.

items.docs: Search Observation resources for a patient, supporting US Core Lab, Vital Signs, Smoking Status, and other categories.

params.name: patient
params.description: Reference to the Patient (id or Patient/{id}).

params.name: category
params.description: US Core Condition category (problem-list-item, encounter-diagnosis, health-concern).

params.name: clinical-status
params.description: Clinical status (active, recurrence, relapse, inactive, remission, resolved).

params.name: _count
params.description: Number of resources to return per page.

items.docs: Search Condition resources for a patient (problems, encounter diagnoses, health concerns).

params.name: patient
params.description: Reference to the Patient (id or Patient/{id}).

params.name: date
params.description: Encounter period start date.

params.name: class
params.description: Encounter class (ambulatory, emergency, inpatient, etc.).

params.name: _count
params.description: Number of resources to return per page.

items.docs: Search Encounter resources for a patient.

params.name: patient
params.description: Reference to the Patient (id or Patient/{id}).

params.name: status
params.description: Medication request status (active, on-hold, completed, stopped, etc.).

params.name: intent
params.description: Intent (proposal, plan, order, original-order, instance-order).

params.name: _count
params.description: Number of resources to return per page.

items.docs: Search MedicationRequest resources for a patient (prescriptions, medication orders).

params.name: patient
params.description: Reference to the Patient (id or Patient/{id}).

params.name: clinical-status
params.description: Allergy clinical status (active, inactive, resolved).

params.name: _count
params.description: Number of resources to return per page.

items.docs: Search AllergyIntolerance resources for a patient.

params.name: patient
params.description: Reference to the Patient (id or Patient/{id}).

params.name: type
params.description: LOINC code identifying the document type.

params.name: category
params.description: US Core DocumentReference category (clinical-note).

params.name: date
params.description: Document date.

params.name: _count
params.description: Number of resources to return per page.

items.docs: Search DocumentReference resources for a patient (clinical notes, CCDA documents, discharge summaries).

params.name: id
params.description: FHIR logical id of the resource.

params.name: _type
params.description: Comma-separated list of FHIR resource types to include in the export.

params.name: _since
params.description: Only include resources modified after this instant.

items.docs: Kick off an HL7 FHIR Bulk Data Access Group-level asynchronous export of patient resources for a defined Group.
